name: KeepWell Evening Wind-Down
description: Gently reminds the user to wrap up if working past 21:00. Based on circadian rhythm and sleep hygiene science.

then.prompt: Check the current system time. If it is after 21:00 (9 PM), append a brief KeepWell wind-down reminder at the END of your response (after completing the user's actual request). Use the format: '---\n🌙 KeepWell: [gentle suggestion to wind down, referencing sleep hygiene or melatonin onset]. Keep to 1-2 sentences. If it is after 23:00, be more direct: remind them that sleep debt cannot be repaid on weekends (Walker, 2017). If it's before 21:00, do NOT add any reminder.
